title: SourceChannel
description: Implements: docs/contracts-canonical.md §6; individual news source configuration

url.description: Feed or API endpoint URL; null for opencli type

language.description: Resolved source language. Defaults to target.language_scope.primary when omitted.

opencli_command.description: OpenCLI tool_id reference; null for rss/api types. Must match a ToolManifest tool_id.

endpoint.description: API endpoint configuration for type=api sources.

tool_ref.description: OpenCLI tool_id for type=opencli sources. Alias for opencli_command.

sandbox_profile_ref.description: Sandbox profile to enforce for this source's tool calls.

credibility_base.description: Source credibility baseline; contributes to news_value_score

fetch_interval_seconds.description: Per-fetch rate limit: minimum seconds between HTTP requests to this source (used by RateLimiter). Defaults to 5.0s.

fetch_full_article.description: Best-effort fetch of linked article HTML to extract full text and images for public in-site reading.

deprecated.description: When true, source is no longer available. Used with enabled=false for documentation.

deprecated_reason.description: Why the source was deprecated (e.g., RSS removed, paywall)

notes.description: Human-readable maintenance notes for editors and operators

api_mapping.description: API JSON response field mapping for type=api sources. Maps API response keys to NewsEvent attributes.

items_key.description: Key in API response body that holds the array of items/articles

published_at.description: Field name for the publication date
